title: Tron - Unstake claimable TRX
description: how to claim TRX that was unstaked over 14 days ago

actions.value:
If you have unstaked some Tron, over 14 days ago, and it's now ready to be claimed - you can easily claim it with this process:

1. Login to Edge and tap into your TRX wallet with the claimable unstake

2. Tap on 'Earn' and then into the Energy or Bandwidth staking option

3. Tap on 'Claim Rewards'


Please let us know if you have any other questions!
